name: diagInterpretAs
title: diagInterpretAs
syntax: long diagInterpretAs( diagResponse response, char primitiveQualifier[]);
description: Treats the data of the response object as the specified primitive. This will cause a reinterpretation of the data, but the data will not be changed.

parameters.name: primitiveQualifier
parameters.description: Qualifier of the service primitive that should be used for reinterpretation.

description: This function determines the actual response primitive by trying to set the interpretation of the argument to the defined variations. 0 is returned if interpretation is possible.

availability: Online mode Not for basic diagnostics
Online mode Not for basic diagnostics
